event: View of Piazza della Signoria, Florence
description: A contemporary painting of the Piazza della Signoria in Florence. On the left, a large pale stone building facade (Palazzo Vecchio area) is rendered with a textured, almost weathered quality. On the right, the open arches of the Loggia dei Lanzi shelter classical statues. Small figures of pedestrians populate the vast open square. The palette is muted with grey-blues, warm ochres, and silvery whites, creating an atmospheric effect. The style balances realism with an impressionistic handling of light and texture.
